[axiom](../../README.md) / [index](../README.md) / experimental\_ParsedMessagesArray

# Type Alias: experimental\_ParsedMessagesArray\<T\>

> **experimental\_ParsedMessagesArray**\<`T`\> = `ExtendedMessages`\<`T`\> & `object`

**`Experimental`**

Array of parsed messages with attached Axiom metadata for prompt tracking.

Returned by parse function and contains [ParsedMessage](../interfaces/experimental_ParsedMessage.md) items with
accessible [AxiomPromptMetadata](../interfaces/experimental_AxiomPromptMetadata.md) via proxy.

 This API is experimental and may change in future versions.

## Type Declaration

### \_axiomMeta

> **\_axiomMeta**: [`experimental_AxiomPromptMetadata`](../interfaces/experimental_AxiomPromptMetadata.md)

[AxiomPromptMetadata](../interfaces/experimental_AxiomPromptMetadata.md) accessible via proxy for prompt tracking

## Type Parameters

### T

`T` *extends* readonly `PromptMessage`[] = readonly `PromptMessage`[]
